title: bidens cernua var. bidens
intro: Bidens cernua var. bidens, also known as nodding beggar-ticks, is a perennial plant in the aster family, characterized by its small, white or pinkish flowers and distinctive nodding habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Bidens cernua var. bidens have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for sore throats, colds, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
